abstract: Type-safe oRPC communication between the main thread and Web Workers via the Message Port adapter. [Web Workers](https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Web/API/Worker) run JavaScript in background threads, preventing UI blocking. Modern runtimes ([Bun](https://bun.com/docs/api/workers), [Deno](https://docs.deno.com/examples/web_workers/)) also support them.
